elements.title: lang::report_page_053_title::local_kopere_bi
elements.commandsql:
SELECT kbi_u.id,
       kbi_u.firstname,
       kbi_u.lastname,
       kbi_u.idnumber,
       kbi_c.id AS courseid,
       kbi_c.fullname
FROM mdl_course kbi_c
       JOIN mdl_context kbi_con ON kbi_con.contextlevel = 50 AND kbi_con.instanceid = kbi_c.id
       JOIN mdl_role_assignments kbi_ra ON kbi_ra.contextid = kbi_con.id
       JOIN mdl_user kbi_u ON kbi_u.id = kbi_ra.userid
       LEFT JOIN (SELECT t.userid, t.courseid
                  FROM (SELECT kbi_gg.itemid, kbi_gg.userid, kbi_gi.courseid
                        FROM mdl_grade_grades kbi_gg
                               JOIN mdl_grade_items kbi_gi ON kbi_gi.id = kbi_gg.itemid
                        WHERE kbi_gg.itemid IN ()) t
                  GROUP BY t.userid, t.courseid) gt ON gt.userid = kbi_u.id AND gt.courseid = kbi_c.id
WHERE kbi_c.id > 0
  AND kbi_c.visible = 1
  AND kbi_u.deleted = 0
  AND kbi_u.suspended = 0
  AND kbi_u.username != 'guest'
  AND kbi_ra.roleid = 5
GROUP BY kbi_u.id, kbi_c.id
